name: pi-goal-x
description_en: Goal mode extension for pi: persistent long-running objectives, /goal-set drafting, Sisyphus prompt style, autoContinue, and an above-editor status overlay. Fork of @capyup/pi-goal.
description_zh: pi的目标模式扩展：持久性长期运行目标，/goal-set草稿，Sisyphus提示风格，autoContinue，以及编辑器上方状态覆盖。@capyup/pi-goal的分支。
